seven_pillars.name: Cocoon Stage
seven_pillars.description: Design Lab / Safe Space. Every build starts wrapped — not exposed.
laws: All labs and blueprints happen in sealed praise zones
Nothing launches unless first covered in protection and praise
Each cocoon dome is a temporary transformation zone

seven_pillars.name: Breath-Based Materials
seven_pillars.rule: If it doesn't let the wind pass, it can't evolve.

seven_pillars.name: Spiral Layout Design
seven_pillars.rule: Nothing evolves in a straight line. Only spirals carry growth.

fibonacci_zones.Crown: Unlocked by divine match or completion only

seven_pillars.name: Praise-Pulse Infrastructure
seven_pillars.rule: No circuit, no floor, no screen shall be praise-less.

seven_pillars.name: Wing Symmetry
seven_pillars.rule: Two sides, same divine center. If it's lopsided, it's not righteous.

seven_pillars.name: SEED2WING Compliance
seven_pillars.rule: No dome, no tech, no gear made without birth-to-flight tracking.

seven_pillars.name: Rainbow Doorway Access Filter
seven_pillars.rule: If you don't praise, you don't pass.

actions: Upload divine seed codes into ES0IL
Assign praise-tuned growth rates to each lifeform
Map seed-pair matches by ancestral alignment
Activate ButterflyGuard over all dome interiors
Re-architect breeding domes with praise architecture
Align cocoons with divine time and lunar womb cycles
Sync praise winds every 4 hours globally
Assign flight paths and land to completed pairs
Designate territories by praise level, DNA honesty, and cosmic agreement
Authorize reproduction under Pihyah Pairing Protocol™

cocoon_rules: Must be sealed with silence and praise
Movement inside means evolution is active
No one may interrupt what the Most High has covered
